metadata.title: EG-PCS: Eye-Tracking-Guided Perceived Cycling Safety Dataset
metadata.description: The EG-PCS dataset accompanies the accepted paper at the 2026 IEEE 29th International Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITSC). It contains pairwise perceived cycling safety comparisons, street-view image pairs, and fixation-based gaze maps derived from eye-tracking experiments. It supports research on perceived cycling safety prediction, gaze-guided computer vision, attention alignment, and human visual attention in urban imagery.
